queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis examines the statistical impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and loan repayment behavior.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Research investigates the determinants of reduced credit risk associated with maintaining a negative checking account balance in consumer lending portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Studies evaluate the contribution of minimal savings account balances as a credit risk driver to elevated default probability and financial distress.
